summary: ClashSolverExtendAllUnusedConnectorsBy100mmCommand — PDF "EXTEND_CONNECTORS". Thin wrapper over ExtendAllConnectors for the clash-solver audit trail.
usecase: Prepare end-runs before the resolve step calls CONNECT_INTO_NEAREST.
notfor: Bulk operations across the whole model — run once per element.
precondition: Active document; target element resolvable; has MEP connectors.
postcondition: New pipes created inside one Transaction; tracker records summary.
logictree:
1) Resolver_ElementUniqueId (Bot) OR single selection (Human); WireError if absent.
2) Resolve element; WireError if not resolvable.
3) length_mm = Resolver_LengthMm ?? 100.0; compute length_ft = length_mm/304.8.
4) Open Transaction "ClashSolver::ExtendConnectors"; new ExtendAllConnectors(doc, el)
   with ExtensionLength=length_ft + OnlyUnconnected=true; helper.Execute().
5) Commit iff any pipes created; otherwise RollBack.
6) Emit connectors_processed + pipes_created + created_pipe_ids.
keywords: solver prep for connect into nearest
